rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY FRANCES COOKSEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition By Administrator To Establish Estates Claim Of Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to January 29, 2013 as no further proof of service filed as of Friday, January 11, 2013. By Local Rule 14.6., all documents must be filed 3 court days prior to the hearing date. Please note, although an amended Request for Special Notice was filed stating notice to numerous heirs could be sent c/o Mr. Accornero, that form was filed by Mr. Accornero. CRC 7.51(a)(2) states authorization must be in writing from the party entitled to notice.
